title: Crypto lobby group Digital Chamber sues Illinois to block digital asset tax
summary: Illinois enacted a 0.2% tax on all crypto transactions last month, with the tax taking effect next year.

title: Crypto Clarity Act still at mercy of ethics section as Democrats balk at Trump deal
summary: The White House has circulated some details of the conflict-of-interest limits the president agreed to with Republican negotiators, but talks are still underway.

title: Bitcoin rally faces key test at $68,000 as 'summer slumber' grips crypto, analysts say
summary: BTC has rebounded 15% from the July lows, but some analysts cautioned that the next move hinges on clearing a level where many recent buyers may look to sell.

title: White House pushes Senate Democrats to take 'historic' crypto Clarity Act ethics deal
summary: Without revealing any details about the actual agreement from President Trump on potential presidential restrictions, his White House is urging its acceptance.

title: Movement Labs files for Chapter 11 bankruptcy months after token scandal
summary: The filing comes after months of upheaval that included a controversial market-making agreement, an internal investigation into its MOVE token launch and a Binance ban tied to its market maker.
